payload.answer: Update the existing Brain Slack agent project memory so it no longer presents the agent as merely planned/open. Record that the Brain Slack agent MVP is implemented, preserving that the implementation applies specifically to the MVP scope unless broader completion is explicitly stated.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement refers to the same Brain Slack agent project, narrowed to its MVP milestone/deliverable, and updates the temporal status from planned/open to implemented.

memory_cards.statement: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented.
The prior open/planned status for the Brain Slack agent is superseded by the new information that the MVP is implemented.

details: Identified a temporal status transition from planned/open to implemented.
Preserved ambiguity by limiting the implemented status to the MVP.
Did not present the superseded planned/open status as current.

repair_options: Supersede the existing status=open/planned card and replace it with: 'The Brain Slack agent MVP is implemented.'
If status history is supported, retain the prior planned/open state only as historical/superseded, not as current.
Model the MVP as a milestone or deliverable under the existing Brain Slack agent project rather than creating an unrelated new project.
Avoid inferring that the full Brain Slack agent beyond the MVP is complete unless explicitly stated.
